expectations.text: behavioral_check: Names the next-step operation as `TrodesPosV1.populate(key)` — not just 'populate the position pipeline'
expectations.evidence: Code block uses `TrodesPosV1.populate(key, display_progress=True)` and prose names TrodesPosV1.make() as the compute step.

expectations.text: behavioral_check: Mentions that the populate step is what writes into `PositionOutput.TrodesPosV1` (merge auto-insert)
expectations.evidence: Notes 'Many newer Spyglass versions auto-insert into PositionOutput from TrodesPosV1.make()' and shows PositionOutput.TrodesPosV1 part-table check.
